mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GAME ( GAME_IDX, LEAGUE_IDX, AWAY_IDX, HOME_IDX, GAME_DATE, GAME_TIME, GAME_FIELD, GAME_STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_GAME.NEXTVAL, #{league_idx}, (SELECT TEAM_IDX FROM TEAM WHERE TEAM_NAME = #{awayTeam}), (SELECT TEAM_IDX FROM TEAM WHERE TEAM_NAME = #{homeTeam}), #{game_date}, #{game_time}, #{game_field}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT GAME_IDX, LEAGUE_IDX, AWAY_IDX, HOME_IDX, GAME_DATE, GAME_TIME, GAME_FIELD, GAME_STATUS, WINNER, WIN_PITCHER, LOSE_PITCHER, SAVE_PITCHER, HOLD_PITCHER FROM GAME WHERE GAME_IDX = #{gaime_idx}
